---
title: "Binding Parameter Schemas"
---

## Overview

`BindingParamSchemas.hpp` defines **AutoParamWidget form structs** — thin
projections of persisted binding types without fields the widget shell supplies
(`slot_name`, `memory_index`). Conversion helpers map between forms and full
binding structs, normalizing `(None)` combo sentinels to empty strings via
`normalizeBindingDataKey()`.

**Location:** `src/DeepLearning/bindings/BindingParamSchemas.hpp`  
**UI hints:** `src/DeepLearning/bindings/BindingParamSchemas.cpp`

## Dynamic and output forms

| Form struct | Binding type | Fields |
|---|---|---|
| `dl::DynamicInputBindingForm` | `SlotBindingData` | `data_key`, `encoder`, `time_offset` |
| `dl::OutputBindingForm` | `OutputBindingData` | `data_key`, `decoder` |

### Conversion helpers

| Helper | Direction |
|---|---|
| `toSlotBindingData(slot_name, form)` | form → `SlotBindingData` |
| `fromSlotBindingData(binding)` | `SlotBindingData` → form |
| `toOutputBindingData(slot_name, form)` | form → `OutputBindingData` |
| `fromOutputBindingData(binding)` | `OutputBindingData` → form |

Memory frame forms (`StaticFrameSourceForm`, `RecurrentFrameSourceForm`) and
their conversion helpers are documented in
[memory_frames.qmd](memory_frames.qmd).

## ParameterUIHints

`BindingParamSchemas.cpp` annotates schemas for AutoParamWidget:

| Struct | Notable annotations |
|---|---|
| `DynamicInputBindingForm` | `data_key` → dynamic combo with `(None)` sentinel; `time_offset` display name |
| `OutputBindingForm` | `data_key` labeled "Target", dynamic combo |
| `DataManagerStaticSource` | `data_key` dynamic combo; `time_offset` tooltip |
| `DataBankStaticSource` | `bank_entry_id` labeled "Bank Entry", dynamic combo |
| `StaticFrameSourceForm` | `source` display name "Source" |
| `StaticCaptureInit` | `data_key` dynamic combo; `frame` tooltip |
| `RecurrentFrameSourceForm` | `output_slot_name` labeled "Output Slot"; `init` labeled "Init Mode" |

Tagged unions (`EncoderVariant`, `StaticInputSourceVariant`, `RecurrentInitVariant`)
inherit field schemas from their alternative structs; no separate `ParameterUIHints`
specializations are required for the union wrappers themselves.

## Widget usage

| Widget | Form struct | Binding type |
|---|---|---|
| `DynamicInputSlotWidget` | `DynamicInputBindingForm` | `SlotBindingData` |
| `OutputSlotWidget` | `OutputBindingForm` | `OutputBindingData` |
| `MemorySlotWidget` | `StaticFrameSourceForm` / `RecurrentFrameSourceForm` | `MemoryFrameBinding` |

See [DeepLearning Widget helpers](../../ui/DeepLearning_Widget/UI/Helpers/helpers.qmd).

## Tests

| Test file | Coverage |
|---|---|
| `tests/DeepLearning/bindings/BindingTypes.test.cpp` | `DynamicInputBindingForm` / `OutputBindingForm` schema extraction, `normalizeBindingDataKey`, `toSlotBindingData` / `toOutputBindingData` |
| `tests/DeepLearning/param_schemas/DeepLearningParamSchemas.test.cpp` | `StaticInputSourceVariant` / `RecurrentInitVariant` schema + JSON, memory-frame `ParameterUIHints`, `MemoryFrameBinding` JSON round-trip |
